Fact Symbols with Injective Instances


None


Multiset Rewriting Rules


rule (modulo AC) isend:
   [ !KU( x ) ] --[ K( x ) ]-> [ In( x ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */


rule (modulo AC) irecv:
   [ Out( x ) ] --> [ !KD( x ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */


rule (modulo E) ChanOut_S[color=#ffffff]:
   [ Out_S( $A, $B, x ), !F_Paired( $A, $B ) ]
  --[ ChanOut_S( $A, $B, x ) ]->
   [ Sec( $A, $B, x ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */
rule (modulo E) ChanIn_S[color=#ffffff]:
   [ Sec( $A, $B, x ) ]
  --[ ChanIn_S( $A, $B, x ) ]->
   [ In_S( $A, $B, x ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */
rule (modulo E) Issuer_Init:
   [ Fr( ~x ), Fr( ~y ) ]
  --[
  Issuer_Init( 'Issuer' ), OnlyOnce( 'Issuer_Init' )
  ]->
   [
   !Ltk( 'Issuer', ~x, ~y ),
   !Pk( 'Issuer', PkX(~x, 'P2'), PkY(~y, 'P2')
   ),
   Out( <PkX(~x, 'P2'), PkY(~y, 'P2')> ),
   !Issuer_Initialised( 'Issuer' )
   ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */
rule (modulo E) Issuer_KeyReveal:
   [ !Ltk( I, ~x, ~y ) ]
  --[ KeyReveal( 'Issuer_KeyReveal', I ) ]->
   [ Out( <~x, ~y> ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */
rule (modulo E) TPM_INIT:
   [ Fr( ~TPM_AES_Seed ), Fr( ~TPM_EK_Seed ) ]
  --[ TPM_Init( $PS ), OnlyOnce( 'TPM_INIT' ) ]->
   [
   !TPM_AES_Key( $PS, KDF_AES(~TPM_AES_Seed) ),
   TPM_EK_SEED( $PS, ~TPM_EK_Seed ), TPM_Initialised( $PS )
   ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */
rule (modulo E) TPM_AESReveal:
   [ !TPM_AES_Key( PS, aes_key ) ]
  --[ KeyReveal( 'TPM_AESReveal', PS ) ]->
   [ Out( aes_key ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */
rule (modulo E) Host_Init:
   [ ]
  --[ Host_Init( $AS ), OnlyOnce( 'Host_Init' ) ]->
   [ Host_Initialised( $AS ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */
rule (modulo E) Platform_Setup:
   [
   TPM_Initialised( $PS ), Host_Initialised( $AS ),
   !Issuer_Initialised( I )
   ]
  --[ Bind( $PS, $AS, I ), OnlyOnce( 'Platform_Setup' )
  ]->
   [
   Out_S( $AS, $PS, 'createPrimary' ), !F_Paired( $AS, $PS ),
   !F_Paired( $PS, $AS )
   ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */
rule (modulo E) TPM2_CreatePrimary:
   [
   In_S( $AS, $PS, 'createPrimary' ),
   TPM_EK_SEED( $PS, ~TPM_EK_Seed )
   ]
  --[
  TPM2_EK_Created( $PS, $AS, pk(KDF_EK(~TPM_EK_Seed)) ),
  OnlyOnce( 'TPM2_CreatePrimary' )
  ]->
   [
   Out_S( $PS, $AS,
          <<'EK_public_data', pk(KDF_EK(~TPM_EK_Seed))>,
           'returnEK'>
   ),
   !TPM_ENDORSEMENT_SK( $PS, KDF_EK(~TPM_EK_Seed),
                        pk(KDF_EK(~TPM_EK_Seed))
   ),
   !TPM_ENDORSEMENT_PK( $PS,
                        <'EK_public_data', pk(KDF_EK(~TPM_EK_Seed))>
   )
   ]

  // loop breaker: [0]
  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */
rule (modulo E) TPM_EKReveal:
   [
   !TPM_ENDORSEMENT_SK( PS, KDF_EK(~TPM_EK_Seed),
                        pk(KDF_EK(~TPM_EK_Seed))
   )
   ]
  --[
  KeyReveal( 'TPM_EKReveal_tpm', PS ),
  KeyReveal( 'TPM_EKReveal_pke', pk(KDF_EK(~TPM_EK_Seed)) )
  ]->
   [ Out( KDF_EK(~TPM_EK_Seed) ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */
rule (modulo E) Host_Store_EK:
   [
   In_S( $PS, $AS,
         <<'EK_public_data', pk(KDF_EK(~TPM_EK_Seed))>,
          'returnEK'>
   )
   ]
  --[ Store_EK( $PS, $AS ), OnlyOnce( 'Host_Store_EK' )
  ]->
   [
   Out_S( $AS, $PS,
          <pk(KDF_EK(~TPM_EK_Seed)), 'createDAAKey'>
   ),
   Host_State_01( $PS, $AS, pk(KDF_EK(~TPM_EK_Seed)) )
   ]

  // loop breaker: [0]
  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */
rule (modulo E) TPM2_Create:
   [
   In_S( $AS, $PS,
         <pk(KDF_EK(~TPM_EK_Seed)), 'createDAAKey'>
   ),
   !TPM_AES_Key( $PS, aes_key ), Fr( ~f )
   ]
  --[
  TPM2_DAA_Created( $PS, $AS ),
  DeriveDAAKey( $PS, $AS, pk(KDF_EK(~TPM_EK_Seed)), ~f ),
  OnlyOnce( 'TPM2_Create' )
  ]->
   [
   Out_S( $PS, $AS,
          <senc(~f, aes_key),
           <'DAA_public_data', multp(~f, 'P1')>,
           'returnDAAKey'>
   ),
   !TPM_DAA_SK( $PS, pk(KDF_EK(~TPM_EK_Seed)), ~f )
   ]

  // loop breaker: [0]
  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */
rule (modulo E) TPM_DAAReveal:
   [ !TPM_DAA_SK( PS, pk(KDF_EK(~TPM_EK_Seed)), ~f ) ]
  --[
  KeyReveal( 'TPM_DAAReveal_tpm', PS ),
  KeyReveal( 'TPM_DAAReveal_pke', pk(KDF_EK(~TPM_EK_Seed)) )
  ]->
   [ Out( ~f ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */
rule (modulo E) Host_Store_DAA_Key:
   [
   In_S( $PS, $AS,
         <senc(~f, KDF_AES(~TPM_AES_Seed)),
          <'DAA_public_data', multp(~f, 'P1')>,
          'returnDAAKey'>
   ),
   Host_State_01( $PS, $AS, pk(KDF_EK(~TPM_EK_Seed)) )
   ]
  --[
  Store_DAA( $PS, $AS ),
  PlatformSendKeys( $PS, $AS, pk(KDF_EK(~TPM_EK_Seed)),
                    <'DAA_public_data', multp(~f, 'P1')>,
                    'Issuer'
  ),
  Alive( $AS ), Role( 'Platform' ), Honest( $PS ),
  Honest( $AS ), Honest( pk(KDF_EK(~TPM_EK_Seed)) ),
  Honest( 'Issuer' ),
  OnlyOnce( 'Host_Store_DAA_Key' )
  ]->
   [
   !EK_FOR_ISSUER( pk(KDF_EK(~TPM_EK_Seed)) ),
   Out( <pk(KDF_EK(~TPM_EK_Seed)),
         <'DAA_public_data', multp(~f, 'P1')>,
         'join_Issuer_1'>
   ),
   Host_State_02( $PS, $AS, pk(KDF_EK(~TPM_EK_Seed)),
                  <'DAA_public_data', multp(~f, 'P1')>,
                  senc(~f, KDF_AES(~TPM_AES_Seed))
   )
   ]

  // loop breaker: [0]
  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */
rule (modulo E) Issuer_Check_EK_Send_Challenge:
   [
   In( <pk(KDF_EK(TPM_EK_Seed)),
        <'DAA_public_data', multp(f, 'P1')>,
        'join_Issuer_1'>
   ),
   Fr( ~K_1 ), Fr( ~s ), !EK_FOR_ISSUER( pk(KDF_EK(TPM_EK_Seed)) )
   ]
  --[
  Check_Ek( pk(KDF_EK(TPM_EK_Seed)) ),
  Check_QPD( <'DAA_public_data', multp(f, 'P1')
             >
  ),
  Associate( curlyK(~K_1), pk(KDF_EK(TPM_EK_Seed)),
             <'DAA_public_data', multp(f, 'P1')>
  ),
  Alive( 'Issuer' ), Honest( 'Issuer' ),
  Honest( pk(KDF_EK(TPM_EK_Seed)) ),
  IssuerReceivedKeys( 'Issuer', pk(KDF_EK(TPM_EK_Seed)),
                      <'DAA_public_data', multp(f, 'P1')>
  ),
  OnlyOnce( 'Issuer_Check_EK_Send_Challenge' )
  ]->
   [
   Out( <
         MAC(<'1',
              len16(senc(<'1', curlyK(~K_1)>,
                         KDF_a(<'1', ~s>, 'STORAGE',
                               <'1', 'SHA256',
                                H_SHA256(<'DAA_public_data', multp(f, 'P1')>)
                               >))),
              senc(<'1', curlyK(~K_1)>,
                   KDF_a(<'1', ~s>, 'STORAGE',
                         <'1', 'SHA256',
                          H_SHA256(<'DAA_public_data', multp(f, 'P1')>)
                         >)),
              '1', 'SHA256',
              H_SHA256(<'DAA_public_data', multp(f, 'P1')>)
             >,
             KDF_a(<'1', ~s>, 'INTEGRITY',
                   'NULL')),
         len16(senc(<'1', curlyK(~K_1)>,
                    KDF_a(<'1', ~s>, 'STORAGE',
                          <'1', 'SHA256',
                           H_SHA256(<'DAA_public_data', multp(f, 'P1')>)
                          >))),
         senc(<'1', curlyK(~K_1)>,
              KDF_a(<'1', ~s>, 'STORAGE',
                    <'1', 'SHA256',
                     H_SHA256(<'DAA_public_data', multp(f, 'P1')>)
                    >)),
         aenc(<'1', ~s>, pk(KDF_EK(TPM_EK_Seed))),
         'Host_SendChallenge'>
   ),
   Issuer_State_01( 'Issuer', curlyK(~K_1),
                    pk(KDF_EK(TPM_EK_Seed)),
                    <'DAA_public_data', multp(f, 'P1')>
   )
   ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */
rule (modulo E) Host_Passthrough_1:
   [
   In( <curlyH, len16(curlyK_hat), curlyK_hat,
        aenc(s, pk(KDF_EK(~TPM_EK_Seed))), 'Host_SendChallenge'>
   ),
   Host_State_02( $PS, $AS, pk(KDF_EK(~TPM_EK_Seed)), Q_PD, Q_SD )
   ]
  --[
  Passthrough_ActivateCred( $PS, $AS ),
  OnlyOnce( 'Host_Passthrough' )
  ]->
   [
   Out_S( $AS, $PS,
          <Q_SD, Q_PD, curlyH, len16(curlyK_hat), curlyK_hat,
           aenc(s, pk(KDF_EK(~TPM_EK_Seed))),
           'TPM2_ActivateCredentials'>
   ),
   Host_State_03( $PS, $AS, pk(KDF_EK(~TPM_EK_Seed)), Q_PD, Q_SD )
   ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */
rule (modulo E) TPM2_ActivateCredential:
   [
   In_S( $AS, $PS,
         <senc(~f, aes_key),
          <'DAA_public_data', multp(~f, 'P1')>,
          curlyH, len16(senc(<'1', curlyK(K_1)>, k_e)),
          senc(<'1', curlyK(K_1)>, k_e),
          aenc(<'1', s>, pk(KDF_EK(~TPM_EK_Seed))),
          'TPM2_ActivateCredentials'>
   ),
   !TPM_AES_Key( $PS, aes_key ),
   !TPM_ENDORSEMENT_SK( $PS, e, pk(KDF_EK(~TPM_EK_Seed)) )
   ]
  --[
  Eq( MAC(<'1',
           len16(senc(<'1', curlyK(K_1)>, k_e)),
           senc(<'1', curlyK(K_1)>, k_e), '1',
           'SHA256',
           H_SHA256(<'DAA_public_data', multp(~f, 'P1')
                    >)
          >,
          KDF_a(<'1',
                 snd(adec(aenc(<'1', s>, pk(KDF_EK(~TPM_EK_Seed))),
                          e))
                >,
                'INTEGRITY', 'NULL')),
      curlyH
  ),
  Eq( k_e,
      KDF_a(<'1',
             snd(adec(aenc(<'1', s>, pk(KDF_EK(~TPM_EK_Seed))),
                      e))
            >,
            'STORAGE',
            <'1', 'SHA256',
             H_SHA256(<'DAA_public_data', multp(~f, 'P1')
                      >)
            >)
  ),
  CurlyK_recomputed( $PS, $AS ),
  OnlyOnce( 'TPM2_ActivateCredential' )
  ]->
   [
   Out_S( $PS, $AS,
          <
           snd(sdec(senc(<'1', curlyK(K_1)>, k_e),
                    KDF_a(<'1',
                           snd(adec(aenc(<'1', s>, pk(KDF_EK(~TPM_EK_Seed))),
                                    e))
                          >,
                          'STORAGE',
                          <'1', 'SHA256',
                           H_SHA256(<'DAA_public_data', multp(~f, 'P1')
                                    >)
                          >))),
           'ret_TPM2_ActivateCredentials'>
   )
   ]

  // loop breaker: [0]
  /*
  rule (modulo AC) TPM2_ActivateCredential:
     [
     In_S( $AS, $PS,
           <senc(~f, aes_key),
            <'DAA_public_data', multp(~f, 'P1')>,
            curlyH, len16(senc(<'1', curlyK(K_1)>, k_e)),
            senc(<'1', curlyK(K_1)>, k_e),
            aenc(<'1', s>, pk(KDF_EK(~TPM_EK_Seed))),
            'TPM2_ActivateCredentials'>
     ),
     !TPM_AES_Key( $PS, aes_key ),
     !TPM_ENDORSEMENT_SK( $PS, e, pk(KDF_EK(~TPM_EK_Seed)) )
     ]
    --[
    Eq( MAC(<'1',
             len16(senc(<'1', curlyK(K_1)>, k_e)),
             senc(<'1', curlyK(K_1)>, k_e), '1',
             'SHA256',
             H_SHA256(<'DAA_public_data', multp(~f, 'P1')
                      >)
            >,
            KDF_a(<'1', z.1>, 'INTEGRITY',
                  'NULL')),
        curlyH
    ),
    Eq( k_e,
        KDF_a(<'1', z.1>, 'STORAGE',
              <'1', 'SHA256',
               H_SHA256(<'DAA_public_data', multp(~f, 'P1')
                        >)
              >)
    ),
    CurlyK_recomputed( $PS, $AS ),
    OnlyOnce( 'TPM2_ActivateCredential' )
    ]->
     [
     Out_S( $PS, $AS, <z, 'ret_TPM2_ActivateCredentials'>
     )
     ]
    variants (modulo AC)
    1. ~TPM_EK_Seed
             = ~TPM_EK_Seed.27
       ~f = ~f.28
       K_1 = K_1.29
       e = e.32
       k_e = k_e.33
       s = s.34

                        KDF_a(<'1',
                               snd(adec(aenc(<'1', s.34>,
                                             pk(KDF_EK(~TPM_EK_Seed.27))),
                                        e.32))
                              >,
                              'STORAGE',
                              <'1', 'SHA256',
                               H_SHA256(<'DAA_public_data', multp(~f.28, 'P1')
                                        >)
                              >)))
       z.1 = snd(adec(aenc(<'1', s.34>,
                             pk(KDF_EK(~TPM_EK_Seed.27))),
                        e.32))
    
    2. ~TPM_EK_Seed
             = ~TPM_EK_Seed.27
       ~f = ~f.28
       K_1 = K_1.29
       e = e.32
       k_e = KDF_a(<'1',
                      snd(adec(aenc(<'1', s.34>,
                                    pk(KDF_EK(~TPM_EK_Seed.27))),
                               e.32))
                     >,
                     'STORAGE',
                     <'1', 'SHA256',
                      H_SHA256(<'DAA_public_data', multp(~f.28, 'P1')
                               >)
                     >)
       s = s.34
       z = curlyK(K_1.29)
       z.1 = snd(adec(aenc(<'1', s.34>,
                             pk(KDF_EK(~TPM_EK_Seed.27))),
                        e.32))
    
    3. ~TPM_EK_Seed
             = ~TPM_EK_Seed.27
       ~f = ~f.28
       K_1 = K_1.29
       e = KDF_EK(~TPM_EK_Seed.27)
       k_e = k_e.33
       s = s.34
       z = snd(sdec(senc(<'1', curlyK(K_1.29)>, k_e.33),
                        KDF_a(<'1', s.34>, 'STORAGE',
                              <'1', 'SHA256',
                               H_SHA256(<'DAA_public_data', multp(~f.28, 'P1')
                                        >)
                              >)))
       z.1 = s.34
    
    4. ~TPM_EK_Seed
             = ~TPM_EK_Seed.27
       ~f = ~f.28
       K_1 = K_1.29
       e = KDF_EK(~TPM_EK_Seed.27)
       k_e = KDF_a(<'1', s.34>, 'STORAGE',
                     <'1', 'SHA256',
                      H_SHA256(<'DAA_public_data', multp(~f.28, 'P1')
                               >)
                     >)
       s = s.34
       z = curlyK(K_1.29)
       z.1 = s.34
    // loop breaker: [0]
  */
rule (modulo E) Host_ReceiveCurlyK:
   [
   In_S( $PS, $AS,
         <curlyK(K_1), 'ret_TPM2_ActivateCredentials'>
   ),
   !Pk( 'Issuer', PkX(x, 'P2'), PkY(y, 'P2')
   ),
   Host_State_03( $PS, $AS, pk(KDF_EK(~TPM_EK_Seed)), Q_PD, Q_SD )
   ]
  --[
  Received_CurlyK( $PS, $AS ),
  OnlyOnce( 'Host_ReceiveCurlyK' )
  ]->
   [
   Out_S( $AS, $PS,
          <BSN('bottom'), BSN('bottom'),
           BSN('bottom'), 'TPM2_Commit'>
   ),
   Host_CurlyK1( $PS, $AS, pk(KDF_EK(~TPM_EK_Seed)), curlyK(K_1) ),
   Host_State_04( $PS, $AS, pk(KDF_EK(~TPM_EK_Seed)), Q_PD, Q_SD,
                  <PkX(x, 'P2'), PkY(y, 'P2'), curlyK(K_1),
                   pk(KDF_EK(~TPM_EK_Seed))>
   )
   ]

  // loop breaker: [0]
  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */
rule (modulo E) TPM2_Commit:
   [
   In_S( $AS, $PS,
         <BSN('bottom'), BSN('bottom'),
          BSN('bottom'), 'TPM2_Commit'>
   ),
   Fr( ~cv ), Fr( ~r_cv )
   ]
  --[ TPM2_Commited( $PS, $AS ), OnlyOnce( 'TPM2_Commit' )
  ]->
   [
   Out_S( $PS, $AS,
          <E(~r_cv, 'P1'), Nonce(~cv), 'retTPM2_commit'
          >
   ),
   TPM_CV_E( $PS, Nonce(~cv), ~r_cv )
   ]

  // loop breaker: [0]
  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */
rule (modulo E) Host_ReceiveEAndCV:
   [
   In_S( $PS, $AS,
         <E(r_cv, 'P1'), Nonce(cv), 'retTPM2_commit'>
   ),
   Host_State_04( $PS, $AS, pk(KDF_EK(~TPM_EK_Seed)),
                  <'DAA_public_data', multp(~f, 'P1')>, Q_SD,
                  str
   )
   ]
  --[
  Host_Created_p( $PS, $AS ),
  OnlyOnce( 'Host_ReceiveEAndCV' )
  ]->
   [
   Out_S( $AS, $PS,
          <
           H_k_4('P1', multp(~f, 'P1'), E(r_cv, 'P1'),
                 str),
           'TPM2_Hash'>
   ),
   Host_cv( $PS, $AS, Nonce(cv) ),
   Host_State_05( $PS, $AS, pk(KDF_EK(~TPM_EK_Seed)),
                  <'DAA_public_data', multp(~f, 'P1')>, Q_SD
   )
   ]

  // loop breaker: [0]
  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */
rule (modulo E) TPM2_Hash:
   [ In_S( $AS, $PS, <p, 'TPM2_Hash'> ), Fr( ~tkt ) ]
  --[ TPM2_Created_P_TPM( $PS, $AS ), OnlyOnce( 'TPM2_Hash' )
  ]->
   [
   Out_S( $PS, $AS,
          <H_k_1(p), Nonce(~tkt), 'ret_TPM2_Hash'>
   ),
   TPM_tkt( $PS, Nonce(~tkt) )
   ]

  // loop breaker: [0]
  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */
rule (modulo E) Host_Receive_P_TPM_TKT:
   [
   In_S( $PS, $AS,
         <H_k_1(p), Nonce(tkt), 'ret_TPM2_Hash'>
   ),
   Host_cv( $PS, $AS, Nonce(cv) )
   ]
  --[
  Host_Received_P_TPM( $PS, $AS ),

restriction equality:
  "∀ #i x y. (Eq( x, y ) @ #i) ⇒ (x = y)"
  // safety formula

  /*
  expanded formula:
  "∀ #i x y. (Eq( x, y ) @ #i) ⇒ (x = y)"

restriction notlinked:
  "∀ #i J1 J2 K1 K2.
         (NotLinked( J1, J2, K1, K2 ) @ #i) ⇒
         ((¬(J1 = J2)) ∨ (¬(K1 = K2)))"
  // safety formula

  /*
